pages.title: Kongmy Digital Solutions
pages.content:
# Kongmy Digital Solutions
> KONGMY DIGITAL SOLUTIONS is an independent, founder-led technology consultancy serving SMEs in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Unlike traditional bloated IT agencies, KONGMY focuses on ruthless operational efficiency—building bespoke internal tools, AI & WhatsApp automation, and leaner serverless infrastructure without the typical agency overhead.

Our approach is agile and bespoke, solving real operational bottlenecks rather than selling off-the-shelf software packages.

## Services
- [Website & App Hosting](https://kongmy.dev/#services): Reliable, scalable hosting that doesn't require a dedicated IT person.
- [AI & WhatsApp Automation](https://kongmy.dev/#services): Conversational interfaces that integrate with your business systems.
- [Custom Software & System Integrations](https://kongmy.dev/#services): Internal tools and customer portals that fit how your business actually works.

## Contact
